xacml:Rule.xacml:Description: A rule giving user with role DAGL, REGN and the app owner dihe the right to instantiate a instance of a given app of dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol
Rule that defines that user with role DAGL, REGN and A0239 can read and write for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in Task_1
Rule that defines that user with role REVI, "Regnskapsfører med signeringsrettighet", "Revisormedarbeider" or "Ansvarlig revisor" can read for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in Task_1

Rule that defines that user with role REVI, "Regnskapsfører med signeringsrettighet", "Revisormedarbeider"or "Ansvarlig revisor" can read, write, sign, and reject for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in Task_2
Rule that defines that user with role DAGL and REGN can read for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in Task_2
Rule that defines that user with role REVI, "Regnskapsfører med signeringsrettighet", "Revisormedarbeider" or "Ansvarlig revisor" can read for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in Task_3
Rule that defines that user with role DAGL and REGN can delete instances of dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol
Rule that defines that org can write to instances of dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol for any states
Rule that defines that org can complete an instance of dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol which state is at the end event.
A rule giving user with role DAGL and the app owner dihe the right to read the appresource events of a given app of dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol

Rule that defines that user with role REVI, "Regnskapsfører med signeringsrettighet", "Revisormedarbeider" or "Ansvarlig revisor" can read for dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol when it is in EndEvent
A rule giving the app owner dihe the right to read and subscribe to the events generated by the app dihe/omsetningsoppgave-for-alkohol
